home.heroSubtitle: Discover fashion, electronics, beauty, home essentials and more from verified marketplace sellers.
home.productsDesc: Explore selected products from active sellers across Mahi Store marketplace.
home.categoryDesc: Explore marketplace departments and discover products from verified vendors.
home.featuredStoresDesc: Shop from trusted marketplace sellers with active products, ratings and verified store profiles.
home.dealsDesc: Discounted products from verified stores and active marketplace vendors.
home.sellerDesc: Vendors manage stores, products, orders and payouts while customers enjoy one clean shopping experience.
home.topSellingDesc: Best-selling products based on customer interest and marketplace activity.
home.newArrivalsDesc: Recently added products from marketplace stores.
home.allStoresDesc: Explore verified vendors, seller collections and multi-category stores from one premium storefront.
home.centerPromoDesc: A clean storefront for fashion, electronics, beauty, home and lifestyle sellers.
home.dealBannerDesc: Promotional products, flash deals and seller discounts can be managed from the admin panel.

shop.heroSubtitle: Browse fashion, electronics, beauty, home, grocery and sports products from verified sellers.
shop.noProductsDesc: Try changing category, rating, sorting or search keyword.
shop.promoTitle: Vendor Deals, New Arrivals And Daily Discounts
shop.promoDesc: This storefront is ready for admin-managed banners, vendor offers, featured products and marketplace campaigns.

stores.heroSubtitle: Browse sellers, store collections, product categories and marketplace vendor profiles.
stores.noStoresDesc: Try changing category or search keyword.
stores.promoDesc: Launch your store, manage products, receive orders and grow with a premium multivendor marketplace.

category.heroSubtitle: Browse products from verified stores in this marketplace department.

storeDetail.storeProductsDesc: Browse products listed by this marketplace seller.
storeDetail.aboutDesc: This seller profile is ready for backend-connected store description, vendor policies, ratings, reviews, delivery rules and support information.
storeDetail.noProducts: No products found for this store yet.

productDetail.deliveryText: Fast delivery options will connect with backend shipping rules.
productDetail.secureText: Protected checkout and verified seller profile.
productDetail.returnsText: Return policy will be managed from admin settings.
productDetail.overviewDesc: This product detail page is ready for backend description, stock, variants, reviews and vendor information.
productDetail.relatedDesc: More products from similar categories and marketplace sellers.

cart.cartDesc: Review products from multiple vendors before checkout.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.desc: Enter your billing and delivery details to place your order.
checkout.successDesc: Thank you for shopping with Mahi Store. Your order has been saved locally for now.

tracking.title: Track Your Order
tracking.desc: Enter your order number to check the latest order status.
tracking.message: Your order tracking API will be connected after backend setup.

account.loginDesc: Sign in to view orders, manage addresses and track marketplace purchases.
account.registerDesc: Create your Mahi Store customer account for faster checkout and order history.
account.lostDesc: Enter your email address and we will send a password reset link.
account.resetDesc: Create a new password for your customer account.
account.dashboardDesc: Manage your marketplace orders, saved addresses and account details.
account.messageApi: This account API will be connected after backend setup.

vendor.topBar: Become a vendor and grow your business on Mahi Store
vendor.title: Open Your Store And Start Selling
vendor.desc: Join a premium multivendor marketplace built for sellers, products, orders and payouts.
vendor.benefit1Text: Create a branded store profile with products, categories and seller information.
vendor.benefit2Text: Add, edit and manage marketplace products from the vendor panel.
vendor.benefit3Text: Track orders, manage fulfillment and view vendor wallet payouts.
vendor.step1Text: Submit your seller information and business details.
vendor.step2Text: Admin reviews your vendor profile and activates your store.
vendor.step3Text: Upload products and receive customer orders.

about.title: A Premium Multivendor Marketplace
about.desc: Mahi Store connects customers with trusted sellers, curated products and a clean shopping experience.
about.storyText: Our marketplace is designed for vendors who want a professional store presence and customers who want a smooth product discovery, cart and checkout journey.
about.value1Text: Store profiles, product listings and marketplace standards are managed through the admin system.
about.value2Text: Fashion, electronics, beauty, home, grocery and more can run inside one storefront.
about.value3Text: Vendors can manage products, orders, payouts and store performance.

contact.title: How Can We Help?
contact.desc: Reach out for order support, vendor queries or marketplace assistance.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.success: Contact form API will be connected after backend setup.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Quick answers about shopping, stores, orders, shipping and returns.
faq.q1: How do I place an order?
faq.a1: Add products to cart, go to checkout and submit your billing and delivery details.
faq.q2: Can I buy from multiple vendors?
faq.a2: Yes, the marketplace cart is prepared for multi-vendor ordering.
faq.q3: How do I track my order?
faq.a3: Use the order tracking page or your account order history once backend APIs are connected.
faq.q4: How can I become a seller?
faq.a4: Use the Become A Seller page. Vendor registration will connect with the backend later.

privacy.title: Your Data And Privacy
privacy.desc: This page explains how customer and vendor information will be handled on Mahi Store.
privacy.section1Text: We may collect account details, order information, delivery data, support requests and store activity once backend services are connected.
privacy.section2Text: Information is used to process orders, manage accounts, improve marketplace services and provide customer support.
privacy.section3Text: Security rules, authentication and data access will be managed through the backend and admin panel.

shipping.title: Delivery And Shipping
shipping.desc: Shipping rules can be managed by admin and vendors depending on marketplace setup.
shipping.section1Text: Estimated delivery times will depend on vendor location, courier rules and customer address.
shipping.section2Text: Shipping charges may vary by vendor, product weight, order value or delivery area.
shipping.section3Text: Customers will be able to track orders once backend order tracking is connected.

terms.title: Marketplace Terms
terms.desc: These terms define the expected use of Mahi Store by customers and vendors.
terms.section1Text: Customers should provide accurate order, contact and delivery information.
terms.section2Text: Vendors are responsible for accurate product listings, pricing, inventory and order handling.
terms.section3Text: Mahi Store may manage listings, stores, orders and policies through the admin system.
